title:
PROMPT 031: Rocket Launch вЂ” Startup / Launch Day
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
CANVAS: 1920Г—1080px (16:9)
DURATION: 4.5s | LOOP: No
SVG: Rocket (18 paths: nose cone, body cylinder, 2 side fins, 2 engine nozzles, porthole window circle, window reflection arc, 3 flame tongue paths at base, 4 particle dots around flames, launch platform base rect, ground line) вЂ” start at 960Г—760px, rocket 200px tall

COLOR SPECIFICATION:
Background: #0B1120 (very deep dark blue вЂ” night sky)
Stars: 8 small circle fills (#FFFFFF, 2вЂ“4px, scattered 200px zone above platform) вЂ” static
Rocket body fill: #F1F5F9 (near white)
Rocket stroke: #CBD5E1 (2px)
Nose cone fill: #EF4444 (red)
Fins fill: #94A3B8 (grey)
Engine nozzles fill: #64748B
Porthole fill: #DBEAFE (pale blue)
Window reflection: #FFFFFF50 (30% white arc)
Flame outer path: #F97316 (orange)
Flame middle path: #FBBF24 (amber)
Flame inner path: #FEF08A (pale yellow)
Particle dots: #F97316 (orange, 4вЂ“6px circles)
Platform base: #334155
Ground line: #1E293B

VISUAL LAYOUT:
Rocket sitting on platform at Y:760. Will launch upward off screen.
Stars visible in background from start.

ANIMATION TIMELINE (4.5s total):
0вЂ“0.5s: Stars fade in (opacity 0 в†’ 0.7, ease-out, staggered random offsets 0вЂ“0.3s).
0.5вЂ“1.0s: Rocket and platform fade in (scale 0.9 в†’ 1.0, ease-out spring).
1.0вЂ“1.5s: Flame paths flicker вЂ” all 3 flames scale between (scaleY 0.7 в†’ 1.0, alternating, 0.1s rapid cycle). Particle dots scatter outward from nozzle (translate 20px radially, opacity 1.0 в†’ 0, repeat each 0.3s).
1.5вЂ“1.8s: Rocket shakes (X: 0 в†’ +4px в†’ -4px в†’ +3px в†’ -3px в†’ 0, rapid 50ms intervals).
1.8вЂ“2.8s: Rocket launches вЂ” translates upward (Y: 760 в†’ -200px, ease-in acceleration). Flame trail grows longer as rocket rises (flame scaleY 1.0 в†’ 2.5). Particle cloud expands below.
2.8вЂ“3.2s: Rocket exits frame. Flame trail fades below top of screen.
3.2вЂ“3.8s: Particle cloud at launch site disperses (radial scatter, opacity 1.0 в†’ 0, ease-out).
3.8вЂ“4.5s: Hold launch site, just ground and platform visible. Stars twinkle (random opacity flicker В±0.3, ease-in-out).

EASING CURVES:
- Entry: ease-out
- Shake: linear
- Launch: ease-in (accelerating)
- Flame flicker: linear rapid
- Particle scatter: ease-out
